reflection:
yesterday actually landed. sleep until 6, mood 7, anxiety dropped from 4 the day before all the way down to 1 in a single night. and you figured out why on your own, 'don't ever test more chamomile.' that line in your ideas list is the kind of self-knowledge that compounds. the other two ideas, more carbs feels better and a really light meal before bed, those are worth testing properly, not just noting once and moving on.

the pelvic flare is the loud thing today. padel with dan plus ping pong, then 'cannot find a position where i can watch tv and not fuck up my pelvic.' that is a real input pattern, not random. tv position is the one variable you can actually change tonight, before turkey. the worry about being in pain there, it's sitting under the bloating worry too, you can hear it in the dump.

the 5am wake where you stayed in bed instead of getting up, that was good. you didn't reach for the phone or marcus aurelius, just held the line until 6. different muscle than the last few days.

quick flag. feverish_am 3 and the new pressure in your ears when you talk. both worth keeping an eye on, not panic. the synevo draw today covers thyroid which can do both.

one thing for today. before tv tonight, fix the position first. wedge under the hips or side lying with a pillow between the knees. don't trust the couch to figure it out.
opener: anxiety down from 4 to 1, you cracked the chamomile cause yourself
focus_for_today: before tv tonight, set the pelvic position up first, wedge or side lying with a pillow
